page_content:
ARTH383 Art of Japan after 1500 (3 Credits) Thematically-focused topics in the painting, sculpture, architecture, gardens and decorative arts of early modern, modern and contemporary Japan, from 1500 to present.

ARTH385 Art of China (3 Credits) A chronological survey of Chinese painting, sculpture, and the applied arts.
